_comment: Species: Timescape Beast (光阴兽) from Beyond the Timescape. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Timescape Beast

canonical.appearance: Beast of living time 5 m, body shifts through moments, eyes are clocks
canonical.size: 5 m adult, 0 jin (time); true form spans eras
canonical.behavior: Cultivates by absorbing time; hunts by aging prey in moments
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: timescape_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
